---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Install gbserver with `pip install gbserver[standalone,docker]`
2. Run `gbserver standalone --space-dir ./test`
3. ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or logs if available.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.12.1]
- gbserver version: [e.g., 0.1.0]
- Environment type: [e.g., Docker, Bash, Kubernetes]
